use_cases: Add visual glow effects to section backgrounds for emphasis
Create brand-colored radial gradients for hero or card sections
Provide decorative lighting effects behind content
Add atmospheric depth to landing page sections
Enhance UI with subtle ambient lighting effects
ai_summary: The Glow component by Mikolajdobrucki is a lightweight decorative utility that renders positioned radial gradient effects using CSS custom properties for brand colors. It supports five position variants (top, above, bottom, below, center) and uses responsive height scaling. The component creates layered ellipses with varying opacity to achieve a soft ambient glow effect suitable for hero sections, cards, or background accents in modern SaaS interfaces.
